creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 187631
patch

The 0.17.0 update to security/opensc broke support for Feitian ePass2003 hard tokens; fixes for this issue have already been committed upstream. The attached patchset represents the necessary changes to restore support:

    https://github.com/OpenSC/OpenSC.git/trunk

    r6899 | feitian.technologies | 2017-10-16 05:57:52 -0700 (Mon, 16 Oct 2017) | 5
    lines

    Add ECC support and solve wrong Length status codes with SM card

    Fix #1073
    Fix #1115
